titleStmt.title: SII 26.697: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 697. (A.R. No. 650A of 1909.) KŌNĒRIRĀJAPURAM, THANJAVUR TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is engraved in continuation of No. 696 above and it is built in at the right end and is also incomplete.
It contains the last part of the praśasti of the king.

It appears to record a gift made by the Śivabrāhmaṇas of the thirty circles of the temple of the god Tirunalamuḍaiyār of Tirunalam, a Brahmadē[śam*], in Veṇṇāḍu in Uyyakkoṇḍār-vaḷanāḍu providing for the bathing service and food offerings to the god. Other details are lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
maṇimuṭi cūṭi ceṅkol ceṉṟu ticaitoṟum vaḷarppa veṅkali niṅki meyyaṟantaḻaippak kaliṅkamiriyak kaṭalmalaiyaḷavum vaḷaṅkoḷāḻi varaiyūḻinaṭappa Irucuṭaraḷavu moru kuṭainiḻaṟṟa cempoṉ virasiṅāsanattu tripuvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum
�r vaḷanāṭṭu veṇṇāṭṭu brahmadeyam tirunalattu Uṭaiyār tirunalamuṭaiyārkoyil śivabrāhmaṇan kūbrahmiśvarapaṭṭan cikāḻināṭuṭaiyāṉu kūcūriyan tirunaṭampurivānu kūpaṭṭa comāci Āṭavalānum Āṭavalān celvanu tirunalaviṭaṅkan tirunalamuṭaiyānu Uyani ṭi tirunalaviṭaṅka
�nu tiruciṟṟampalamuṭaiyān brahmiśvaramuṭayānu Uḷḷiṭṭa muppatuvaṭṭattu nāḷuṭaiya civappirāmaṇarom Itdevar Āticaṇṭeśvaratevar devakanmikaḷukku nāṅkaḷ Upaiyapiramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu Ivvūr Āritan parañcoti ceyya pātapaṭṭarukku tarmammāka Amāvāsitoṟum tirumañ
tākavupolinta palicaiyāl I 2 1000ku celavāka Āṭiyaruḷu kalacattirukiṭparappa I nāḻiyum kalacam kuḻanūl kācum payaṟu kāppu Uḻakkumāka kāpparici Uḻakku mañcaṭkāppu ¬ m nellikāppu 100 6 10 2¬m Āṭiyaruḷum pacu nānāḻiyu tiruvamuṟupi kuṟuṇiyum paruppamutu §nta kaṟi 5 palam Uppamutu §�¬m miḷaku 1�lam ney
Digital edition of SII 26.697 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
